mapper.sql: id, user_id, store_id, bay_id, manager_id, `date`, time_slot, car_type, service_type, amount, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY `date`, time_slot
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (id, user_id, store_id, bay_id, manager_id, `date`, time_slot, car_type, service_type, amount, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{storeId}, #{bayId}, #{managerId}, #{date}, #{timeSlot}, #{carType}, #{serviceType}, #{amount}, #{status})
